hero.eyebrow: Work tracking that understands how you get paid
hero.title: Track the work. Know the hours. Understand the money.
hero.subtitle: Alveryn keeps your hours, completed work, rates and absences in one reliable record — even when every day is different.

capabilities.title: From a complicated workday to a clear answer.
capabilities.body: Record the work once. Alveryn keeps the calculation rules and the history organized for you.

items.title: Record work your way
items.description: Use clock-in and clock-out, enter a duration, add completed units or record a fixed-price job. Different activities can live in the same day.

items.title: Calculate what the work means
items.description: Connect rates and payment models to your work. Alveryn turns time and output into understandable hours and earnings.

items.title: Review the complete picture
items.description: See workdays, absences, hours and calculated earnings together instead of rebuilding the month from notes and spreadsheets.

workflow.title: Configure once. Record in seconds. Review anytime.
workflow.body: Alveryn adapts to the rules of your work, then keeps everyday tracking focused.

steps.title: Describe how you work
steps.description: Add your job, payment model, rate and the types of work you perform.

steps.title: Record each working day
steps.description: Track a live session or enter time, units and completed jobs manually.

steps.title: Use the history
steps.description: Review the calendar, absences and totals without calculating everything again.

audience.title: One app when work is more than one simple shift.
audience.body: Alveryn is useful when hours, output and payment do not fit neatly into a basic timer.

items.title: Hourly workers
items.description: Keep an independent history of shifts, breaks, overtime context and absences.

items.title: Multi-job workers
items.description: Separate jobs, work types and rates without splitting your history across different tools.

items.title: Output-based work
items.description: Track rooms, deliveries, pieces, kilometres or completed jobs alongside time.

preview.dashboardAlt: Alveryn dashboard preview showing worked time, earnings, activities and an upcoming absence.

monthPreview.alt: Alveryn monthly overview showing workdays, hours, earnings and an absence.
monthPreview.title: July 2026
monthPreview.absence: Approved absence appears in the same timeline

final.title: Stop reconstructing your work at the end of the month.
final.subtitle: Start building a clear, reliable history of your time, output and earnings today.
